category_title: Timid students who feel voiceless and isolated in peer work
scenario_title: General peer work and partner interactions
minimal_context: Brandon is assigned to work with a partner on a science activity in his 6th-grade classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Brandon, it is time for partner work. Please discuss the science questions with your partner.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains a quiet student and does not initiate the interaction.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Are you two working on the questions together?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Acts very timid and looks down at the desk.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to share your thoughts with your partner to finish the assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I feel like I have no voice... my partner doesn’t like to talk to me.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Brandon, it is time for partner work. Please discuss the science questions with your partner.

STUDENT: (Remains a quiet student and does not initiate the interaction.)

TUTOR: Are you two working on the questions together?

STUDENT: (Acts very timid and looks down at the desk.)

TUTOR: You need to share your thoughts with your partner to finish the assignment.

STUDENT: I feel like I have no voice... my partner doesn’t like to talk to me.

task.content: General peer work/partner interactions in the science classroom prior to the co-teaching intervention.

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When participating in general peer work/partner interactions
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: feels like he has no voice in the science classroom
related_quotes: my partner doesn’t like to talk to me.

behavior_patterns.internal_state: feels like he has no voice
related_quotes: my partner doesn’t like to talk to me.
